calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Mar-16-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo, via Zoom, for Lise McCarthy, Trustee.

Upon query by the court, Ms. Callejo reports that there have been no leads on Toby Landers other than he shared the same address as the Decedent in 1994 and that he has not surfaced since then. Ms. Callejo also reports that a search via an heir search company did not result in any findings regarding Toby Landers and this matter. Upon conclusion of Ms. Callejo's report, the court advises that it is inclined to order any gift to Toby Landers be deposited with the Controller. Ms. Callejo advises that she has no issue with the court's tentative ruling.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
G. Franchesca Callejo for and with Bertha Joung.

The Court noted issue of the pre-accounting entries for reconciliation of account. Ms. Callejo stated that $1,700.00 was paid by Bertha Joung's own funds, that the accountant's fee was not paid by the Trust, that they require the Trust to work with that person (accountant), and the only issue remaining is the Trustee's fee request because the bookkeeper had issues and she spent more time. The Court noted that the Trustee's prior accounting did not have itemized time records, that the Trustee should be mindful to give enough information on her entry to justify the time, that a lot of the fees on account were extraordinary and not likely to repeat. Ms. Callejo stated that they tried their best to allocate fees for accounting and for those calculations there is less than $100.00 difference per month, and they will keep it consistent with the 3rd accounting.

The Fourth Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
